negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Eligibility explicitly restricted to US LCME and osteopathic institutions, which excludes international (non-US) medical students and IMG graduates from this lane. International student contact reference exists (Dr. Irma Frank) but no published eligibility for international students on this hub.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: medstarwashington.org itself does not surface a visiting-students lane; users without prior knowledge of the Georgetown academic affiliation may not find this lane.

nextAction: Eligible for public-safe activation in a future sprint with caveats: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — Georgetown SOM, not MedStar WHC hospital-specific; (b) MS4 only; (c) US LCME/AOA only; (d) VSLO required; (e) $156 total admin fee + malpractice $1M/$3M required separately; (f) MedStar WHC is named as a placement site but specific availability is by department in VSLO. Separate retry queued for the international-students-contact lane (Dr. Frank) to determine if there is a documented international pathway not on the public hub.
plainEnglishSummary: MedStar Washington Hospital Center accepts visiting medical students via the Georgetown SOM visiting-students program. Only 4th-year students from US LCME-accredited or osteopathic schools are eligible; international students are not eligible on the public hub. Applications go through VSLO. The admin fee is $156 total; malpractice insurance of $1M per incident / $3M aggregate is required. The source is the Georgetown SOM hub, not the hospital page — placement at MedStar WHC specifically is by department availability through VSLO.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because DC moved from a thin-coverage state toward documented audience + application + cost evidence for a major DC academic medical center; no noindex/backend/schema work touched.
